Title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
Description:
Two locals we work with were out salvaging at ~mission(Location|Address) when they had some issues with faulty equipment. One managed to escape, but their partner, ~mission(TargetName) was unfortunately left behind.

With the state they were last reported to be in, I’m guessing they didn’t make it, but I’d like to know for sure. If you’re willing, I could use your help in finding their remains.

If you can track them down, I’ll see that you’re properly compensated for the effort.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
